title: ruellia multifolia var. viscosissima
intro: Ruellia multifolia var. viscosissima, also known as the sticky ruellia, is a variety of flowering plant in the Acanthaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, derived from its leaves and stems. The health benefits of Ruellia multifolia var. viscosissima include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating skin irritations and wounds. The plant is used in traditional herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
